title: Welcome to the 76 Graphics Blog
excerpt: Field notes from the shop floor — wraps, brand work, and the craft behind everything we make. Pull up a chair.
author: 76 Graphics
body:
We started 76 Graphics to build the kind of brand work that turns heads on the highway and on the screen. This blog is where we'll share the stuff that doesn't fit on a project page — the why behind each wrap, the late-night problem solving, the materials we love, and the trends we're watching.

Expect short reads, deep dives, and the occasional rant about why so many fleet wraps are forgettable. New posts go up regularly, so check back — or better yet, follow us on Instagram and we'll point you to anything worth reading.
